title: Post-harvest Insect Pests of Groundnut and their Management
abstract:
Groundnuts after harvest are attacked by a plethora of insect pests in storage
across the world. This publication discusses the importance of post-harvest
processing in the management of insect pests. Emphasis is given to crop
husbandry, monitoring, sampling, prevention of insect damage, management
of established infestation, and eco-friendly management in commercial and
farm-household situations. This bulletin also discusses various practices
suitable for commercial and household storage
funders: The OPEC Fund for International Development
